channel.title: Linfamy
channel.description:
Learn about the history and folklore of Japan! Occasionally funny.
MERCH: https://shop.linfamy.com/ (charms, stickers, tees, and more!)
Send me mail: 1090 S Milpitas Blvd #263 Milpitas, CA 95035

channel.itunes:subtitle: Linfamy
channel.itunes:summary:
Learn about the history and folklore of Japan! Occasionally funny.
MERCH: https://shop.linfamy.com/ (charms, stickers, tees, and more!)

item.title: Why Women Were ADDICTED to Visiting Temples in Early Japan
item.description:
🎆 Use code "LINFAMY" to receive $5 off for your first #Sakuraco box through my link: https://team.sakura.co/Linfamy or your first #TokyoTreat box through my link: https://team.tokyotreat.com/Linfamy
🎎 Gain deeper understanding of Japanese history & folklore: https://www.linfamy.com
Why Heian women went on pilgrimages.
Learn all about DIVORCE temples: https://youtu.be/hUWrd2B6LjY
🎥🎥 HUGE DETAILED PLAYLISTS 🎥🎥 🔸 Sexual History of Japan: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Yl0m3pm5SCo&list=PLOWnSFzV-C9Yi1N1cZ_u2v-ed5tNeBXaK 🔸 History of Japan (ALL): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ATnFsFRnRsI&list=PLOWnSFzV-C9ZQS70LRfOpQodtb8oogcEs 🔸 Japanese Folktales (ALL): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ngNvakLYNto&list=PLOWnSFzV-C9ZR-2VPUKaMordQkrJzZcyG 🔸 The Kamakura Period (Japan 1185 - 1333): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dql4zmbw_gM&list=PLOWnSFzV-C9bk9tt8CtfNzb8OsQy-DAPK 🔸 Japanese Mythology: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=htyHPh1KSvQ&list=PLOWnSFzV-C9YmtK5BVbB7u5DhkYYj1s0W 🔸 Legendary Weapons of Japan: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M_0n4OSxiIQ&list=PLOWnSFzV-C9ZtZWqaNGFqpDYD42pU_Tqv
00:00 Come for Buddhism 07:07 Continuing the Pilgrimage
📜 SOURCES 🔸 Liminal Journeys: https://www.jstor.org/stable/30233588
#JapaneseHistory #HistoryOfJapan #Linfamy
